content.body:
Replaces the old Node.js CLI with a Go scaffold using Cobra.
Defines RuntimeAdapter and StorageAdapter interfaces, registers all
MVP command stubs, and adds CI workflow with build + test + lint.

- Binary: `leo` (~3.6MB, cross-compiled for darwin/linux × amd64/arm64)
- Commands: init, read, write, query, delete, reindex, validate,
  status, doctor, export, import, profile (list/show/use/create), version
- Interfaces: RuntimeAdapter (for Claude/Cursor/Windsurf adapters),
  StorageAdapter (for JSON/MongoDB backends)
- CI: GitHub Actions with Go 1.26, golangci-lint
- Makefile: build, test, lint, build-all, install, clean

Closes #15

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(cli): rewrite CLI scaffold in Go, replacing Node.js/TypeScript
